feature.name: Links Migration Requirements
feature.description: Phase 1 requirements documentation for migrating Links feature from FileMaker to Supabase

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure directly - create Backend Change Request documents
DO NOT implement code changes - this is Phase 1 (documentation only)
Document all current FileMaker behavior accurately
Include code references with file paths and line numbers

tasks.title: Document Current Links Implementation
tasks.description: Create current-implementation.md documenting how links work in FileMaker, including API calls, service layer, UI components, and user workflows

tasks.title: Create Data Model Mapping
tasks.description: Create data-model-mapping.md mapping FileMaker devLinks fields to Supabase links table, documenting schema gaps and required changes

tasks.title: Define API Contracts
tasks.description: Create api-contracts.md specifying all required backend endpoints/RPCs with request/response examples and validation rules

tasks.title: Document Authorization Requirements
tasks.description: Create authorization.md defining RLS policies, organization scoping, and access control rules for links

tasks.title: Create Migration Plan
tasks.description: Create migration-plan.md detailing data export, ID mapping, transformation, import, and validation steps

tasks.title: Define Acceptance Criteria
tasks.description: Create acceptance-criteria.md with test cases covering all CRUD operations, associations, validation, and edge cases

tasks.title: Create Backend Change Request
tasks.description: Create BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_LINKS.md documenting required schema changes (add task_id column, modify constraints)

tasks.title: Create Requirements README
tasks.description: Create requirements/links/README.md as overview and quick reference to all requirements documentation
